title: SAP Analytics Cloud Content Item
description: Represents a content item in the SAP Analytics Cloud Content Network. Content items are shareable analytics artifacts such as stories, models, and packages.

id.description: The unique identifier of the content item

name.description: The display name of the content item

description.description: A text description of the content item

version.description: The version of the content item

createdTime.description: The timestamp when the item was published

modifiedTime.description: The timestamp when the item was last modified

owner.description: The tenant that published the content item
